name: Stochastic Parrot
short_description: A candid AI cohabitant: a physical, fuzzy, opinionated parrot that rides on your shoulder, gathers context from the world, and interjects on its own terms.
long_description: Stochastic Parrot is a speculative design project that reframes the AI assistant as a non-human cohabitant rather than a subservient digital butler. Instead of an anthropomorphic interface, it embodies a fuzzy parrot character with its own autonomous agency: it wanders with you on your shoulder, collects context from the surrounding environment, whispers contextual information, nudges you about your goals, reacts to where you are, and can engage in 'parrot-to-parrot' social dynamics with other instances. As physical AI, it explores how an affective, opinionated creature-companion with proactive initiative might be a more honest and legible form for everyday AI than a compliant assistant.

images.caption: The Stochastic Parrot, a physical fuzzy parrot designed to ride on the user's shoulder as a candid AI cohabitant.
images.alt_text: A soft, fuzzy parrot-shaped AI companion object rendered against a clean background, designed to perch on a person's shoulder.

sources.title: Stochastic Parrot — A Candid AI Cohabitant
NeurIPS 2025 Creative AI Track: Humanity
sources.access_notes: Featured in the NeurIPS 2025 Creative AI Track per the creator's project page; exact listing URL not verified.

interactions.title: It speaks when it wants to, not when you ask
interactions.description: Mid-conversation the parrot leans in and whispers a piece of context it picked up from the room — it interjects on its own terms rather than waiting for a wake word or a command.

interactions.title: A nudge about the goal you set
interactions.description: As the day drifts, the creature on your shoulder pipes up to remind you about a goal you told it about earlier — closer to a pushy roommate than a silent reminder app.

interactions.title: Two parrots bantering across a table
interactions.description: When another person's parrot is nearby, the two instances banter with each other — an emergent 'parrot-to-parrot' exchange that happens between the AIs rather than for their owners.

interactions.title: An opinionated creature, not a butler
interactions.description: It pushes back, has its own agenda, and behaves like a quirky house pet that happens to share your space — the design deliberately rejects the compliant-assistant frame and wears its 'stochastic parrot' name as a thesis about what LLMs really are.

interactions.title: Reads the room you walked into
interactions.description: Stepping from a quiet hallway into a loud party, the parrot reacts to the shift — using its onboard vision, audio, and environmental sensing to register where you are before it decides whether to chime in.

interactions.title: Quietly clocks a face you forgot
interactions.description: Spotting someone approaching, it murmurs a name and one fact in your ear — a discreet social prompt drawn from its shoulder-level camera and language model, no screen to glance at.

interactions.title: Gossips about you to the other parrot
interactions.description: Left near a friend's instance, the two could trade notes about their owners' moods or plans, surfacing a social dynamic between machines — grounded in the documented parrot-to-parrot banter plus each unit's location and audio context.
